HEARTHCRAFT
⌂ Home ◷ Time ⛏ Build ☺ People ▣ Shots ✦ End ? Info ! Meme

About HearthCraft

A no-griefing economy SMP built around one goal — a community people could call home.

In October 2018, the first iteration of HearthCraft SMP came to be on Minecraft 1.12. It wasn't until April 2019 that the server truly began to flourish. Ever since July 2019, the HearthCraft world would never reset.

Players built incredible structures and, more importantly, spent hours in a community the team worked to keep safe. Through the pandemic, HC was home to tens of thousands of players — thriving among a vast sea of servers because of dedicated staff and a kind community.

The name says it: a hearth is where you gather for warmth. Sweet hellos, laughing, banter, and comfort amidst a cold world — that was the point.

How it worked

HearthCraft was a no-griefing economy SMP with a 0% pay-to-win store, resource worlds, mcMMO, and other features that kept the world interesting without selling advantage.

Read the timeline →

HEARTHCRAFT SMP · 2018 – 2025

One world. Never reset.
